scripts.qa:prepare:r6: npm run qa -- prepare input-packages/R6-sample --release R6 --out inputs/R6
scripts.qa:triage:r6: npm run qa -- triage R6 --out inputs/R6
scripts.qa:plan:r6: npm run qa -- plan R6 --case R6-B7.2-TC01 --case R6-B7.1-TC01 --case R6-B7.3-TC01
scripts.qa:run:r6: npm run qa -- run R6 --case R6-B7.2-TC01 --case R6-B7.1-TC01 --case R6-B7.3-TC01
scripts.qa:run-package:r6: npm run qa -- run-package input-packages/R6-sample --release R6
